name: .dc
syntax:
.DC var1 start1 stop1 incr1
.DC var1 START=start1 STOP=stop1 STEP=incr1
.DC var1 start1 stop1 incr1 [SWEEP] var2 start2 stop2 incr2
.DC var1 type np start1 stop1
.DC DATA=datanm
.DC MONTE=val

parameters.name: var1
parameters.description: Primary sweep variable: independent source, element/model parameter, or TEMP.

parameters.name: start1 / stop1 / incr1
parameters.description: Linear sweep bounds and step (positional or START=/STOP=/STEP=).

parameters.name: type np
parameters.description: LIN|DEC|OCT with point count for parameterized / nested sweeps.

parameters.name: SWEEP var2 …
parameters.description: Optional nested (second) sweep over another source or parameter.

dialectNotes: HSPICE extends classic SPICE .DC with keyword START/STOP/STEP, nested SWEEP, DATA= tables, and MONTE=. Prefer DATA= for multi-parameter corner tables.
